creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch "graphics/gexiv2/files/patch-exiv2-0.21" is integrated upstream:
http://redmine.yorba.org/projects/gexiv2/repository/revisions/c4a8d2eaab978d1a2e61f77062900f0780969fe0/diff/gexiv2/gexiv2-metadata-exif.cpp

The patch from the port fails to apply and the build aborts.

Fix: 

Remove the "graphics/gexiv2/files/patch-exiv2-0.21" patch
